home.heroTitle: I build websites, interfaces, and digital projects that feel like a vibe — and work like a system
home.heroSubtitle: Not just “ship some layout”, but shape feeling, style, logic, and presentation so the project feels worth opening, scrolling, and remembering.
home.aboutTitle: I assemble the impression at the intersection of code, visuals, UX, and AI
home.aboutSubtitle: For me, a website isn’t a stack of blocks. It’s the feeling of the project, rhythm, presentation, and how a person feels inside the interface. My approach is fast, beautiful, and intentional.
home.what1Text: Sites that don’t merely “exist” — they capture attention, keep rhythm, and guide people through meaning.
home.what2Text: Pages that show not only work, but style, character, and level.
home.what3Text: When you need not just a site, but a feeling: atmosphere, character, mood, presentation.
home.what4Text: I use neural networks to accelerate and amplify ideas — not as a substitute for thinking.
home.what5Text: I think through how people read, where they look, where they get lost, and where they decide.
home.what6Text: I can assemble a strong first version quickly — without months of endless approvals.
home.how1Text: I look at the task and the feeling the project should communicate.
home.how2Text: A beautiful site without logic is just a pretty wrapper — so I shape meaning, scenario, and user path.
home.how3Text: With style and logic in place, the build becomes faster, sharper, and stronger.
home.featuredMelanoDesc: A digital showcase for a music project: atmosphere, navigation, and content presentation.
home.featuredNeiroDesc: A direction website: structure, visual tone, and a cohesive digital space.
home.featuredSalievaDesc: A personal site/portfolio with calm editorial delivery focused on materials.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Short notes on speed, attention to detail, and how the finished page feels.
home.testimonial1Quote: She shipped a landing page I actually want to revisit—visuals and logic both land. She got the brief fast, without endless process.
home.testimonial2Quote: Finally a site I’m not embarrassed to drop in an investor chat. Clear structure, calm tone—it reads premium.
home.testimonial3Quote: We got a strong first version very quickly, then only refined details. Rare mix of speed and taste.
home.whyTitle: Why people come for more than code
home.whyLead: Because I can see the project as a whole.
home.whyNotOnlyItems: how to build it|how to code it|which stack to use|how to make it responsive
home.whyButAlsoItems: how to present it|how it will be perceived|where the eye will catch|what people will remember|why it will feel more expensive than it costs
home.audienceItems: experts|creators|digital projects|AI products|studios|anyone who needs a site with character|anyone who refuses a bland template page
home.manifesto: A good website isn’t when it’s “nicely coded”. It’s when the project gains energy, form, and a sense of being alive.
home.finalTitle: If you need a site that looks strong and feels modern — let’s build it
home.finalBody: I can help with concept, structure, packaging, and implementation — from the first vibe to a finished page.

portfolioPage.title: Real case studies: the brief, what shipped on the site, and the client outcome
portfolioPage.lead: Not a screenshot gallery: each project shows the client goal, what was built on the page, and the outcome.
portfolioPage.melanomusicIntro: A site for an AI musician and songwriter: from first impression to track listening and request submission.
portfolioPage.melanomusicTask: Package the music project not as a simple about page, but as a service: show style, authorship, work examples, and a way to order a song.
portfolioPage.melanomusicDone: Homepage, song catalog, services section, track cards, request form, contacts, and legal pages.
portfolioPage.melanomusicResult: Visitors understand who the author is, what can be ordered, listen to examples, and move to action without extra questions.
portfolioPage.melanomusicTrust: Shows how a creative project can become a clear website with a commercial scenario.
portfolioPage.neiroIntro: An AI-first website for a practice that helps businesses turn growth into a system: from positioning to automation.
portfolioPage.neiroTask: Package complex expertise without overload: explain AI, services, implementation scenarios, and the path to a request in plain language.
portfolioPage.neiroDone: Built a premium tech visual style, hero section, service structure, interactive budget calculator, case block, certificates, contacts, and request form.
portfolioPage.neiroResult: The site feels confident, explains the value of the practice, and turns interest into a concrete action: a request.
portfolioPage.neiroTrust: Shows how a complex AI direction can become a clear and commercially useful digital product.
portfolioPage.songmuseIntro: A service website for creating music with AI: from song idea to a request for a finished track.
portfolioPage.songmuseTask: Present the music creation service clearly and commercially: available formats, order flow, and what the client receives.
portfolioPage.songmuseDone: Built the homepage, service pages, audio examples catalog, cart, checkout request flow, contacts, and legal section.
portfolioPage.songmuseResult: Visitors can understand the service, listen to examples, choose a work format, and send a music creation request.
portfolioPage.songmuseTrust: Shows AI-service packaging: a creative topic, clear structure, order path, and work with audio content.
portfolioPage.salievaIntro: A site where the goal is not to say everything, but to quickly create a sense of level and trust.
portfolioPage.salievaTask: Build a page that presents the specialist through visual style, clear structure, and calm delivery without overload.
portfolioPage.salievaDone: Hero section with portrait, What I Do block, service navigation, prices, contacts, and careful mobile adaptation.
portfolioPage.salievaResult: Visitors leave with a clear impression: the expert is understandable, the style is readable, and booking feels easy.
portfolioPage.salievaTrust: Shows how a personal site can build trust before the first message.
portfolioPage.taskplannerIntro: A mobile planner for a manager and team: tasks, assignees, deadlines, voice input, daily summaries, and achievement badges.
portfolioPage.taskplannerTask: The goal was an app where an admin quickly assigns tasks, tracks progress, and sees at the end of the day who completed work, who missed deadlines, and who did not check in.
portfolioPage.taskplannerDone: Built an Android prototype with manual and voice task creation, employee selection, date and time deadlines, Company, Daily Summary, Calendar, Achievements, and Settings screens.
portfolioPage.taskplannerResult: The APK already builds and installs on Android. Next step: server sync, employee registration by company link, shared chat, and automatic evening reports.
portfolioPage.taskplannerTrust: This is more than a showcase: roles, team workflows, deadline control, and motivation through playful badges.
portfolioPage.reportappIntro: A desktop tool for work reports: gather data, turn it into a clearer view, and get the final result faster.
portfolioPage.reportappTask: The reporting flow had too much manual routine: open files, check data, collect the final output, and repeat the same actions again.
portfolioPage.reportappDone: Built the application interface, report-processing logic, and a structure for automation so the user works in one clear window instead of scattered files.
portfolioPage.reportappResult: Reports are prepared faster, manual mistakes are reduced, and the workflow becomes repeatable: open the app, load data, get the result.
portfolioPage.reportappTrust: Shows practical business-focused development: interface, logic, and automation, not just a polished page.

servicesPage.title: I build websites that bring leads — not just sit online
servicesPage.lead: The page is built for contact: people read the offer and reach the button — not a pretty bounce.
servicesPage.process1Text: What the page must sell and to whom
servicesPage.process2Text: From the first screen to the lead — no filler
servicesPage.process3Text: Build, QA, hand off a working site
servicesPage.valueBody: Not pretty for pretty’s sake. I think like a user. I ship the site like a product.
servicesPage.closingTitle: I’ll show how your site will look and work
servicesPage.closingPoint1: Clear project structure: steps, timelines, no chaos
servicesPage.closingPoint2: Confidence in how it presents: safe to share with a client or partner
servicesPage.closingPoint3: A finished interface without endless “one more tiny tweak” loops
servicesPage.s1When: You have a product, not enough leads
servicesPage.s1Result: Visitors read the offer quickly and hit contact — no extra steps
servicesPage.s2When: You need higher rates and stronger trust
servicesPage.s2Result: They see your level — they pick you over cheaper options
servicesPage.s3When: Ads, an event, or a launch
servicesPage.s3Result: Clicks land on the action you need — not nowhere
servicesPage.s4When: AI is in the product — clarity matters
servicesPage.s4Result: Clear why AI is on the page — and what to do next
servicesPage.s5When: Personal brand and a premium price
servicesPage.s5Result: Trust holds the price — easier to sell higher
servicesPage.s6When: The site runs — you need growth

contactsPage.title: Tell me what you’re building — we’ll shape it together
contactsPage.intro: Share the context: launch, site, promo, or an AI-first task. I’ll reply on Telegram or via the site form — whichever you prefer.
